tools.name: audit_dependencies
tools.description: Audit an entire dependency manifest in one call. Paste a package.json (npm), requirements.txt (PyPI), or go.mod (Go) and get a consolidated vulnerability report across every dependency via OSV.dev. Answers whether a project dependency tree is safe without checking packages one by one.

tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Look up a CVE by ID. Returns a compact summary: description, CVSS score/severity, CISA KEV (known-exploited) status, affected products, dates, and top references. Use before approving dependencies, evaluating alerts, or assessing exposure.

tools.name: package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: List known vulnerabilities for a software package (optionally a specific version) using OSV.dev. Covers npm, PyPI, Go, Maven, crates.io, RubyGems, Packagist, NuGet and more. Returns vuln IDs, severity, summary, and fixed versions.

tools.name: url_check
tools.description: Check whether a URL is a known malware/phishing distribution site via abuse.ch URLhaus. Returns threat status, malware family tags, and takedown state. Use before fetching or recommending unfamiliar URLs.

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Get abuse reputation for an IPv4/IPv6 address via AbuseIPDB: abuse confidence score (0-100), report count, ISP, usage type, country. Use to vet inbound connections, log entries, or suspicious hosts.
